journey-onboard.evidence: Landing page shows a clearly visible 'Start Creating' button linked to /onboarding without scrolling.

journey-builder.evidence: Three.js canvas renders at 2064x1028 and a sidebar displays 10 object pickers (Box, Ball, Pillar, Cone, Donut, Tree, House, Star, Cloud, Rock).

journey-ai.evidence: AI companion panel opens with input field; typing 'help me' returns a non-empty response about placing objects in the world.

journey-save.evidence: Save button exists and persists world to gallery, but reloading /builder resets the world name to 'My World' instead of restoring saved state.

journey-gallery.evidence: Gallery at /gallery renders a 'My Worlds' heading with a saved world card showing name, object count, and date.
